page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g9it.16xlarge is a general-purpose virtual machine instance based on the KVM hypervisor. It features an x86_64 architecture powered by an Intel Xeon 6982P-C processor operating at a clock speed of 3.2 GHz. The instance is configured with 64 dedicated physical cores and 64 vCPUs, utilizing a 1.0 thread-per-core ratio to ensure dedicated compute allocation without hyperthreading overhead.

This instance is equipped with 256.0 GB of system memory, providing a balanced allocation of 4.0 GB of RAM per vCPU. It does not include local storage, meaning all storage requirements must be met via network-attached block storage. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 36 Gbps, and the instance does not include complimentary public IPv4 addresses.

Given its dedicated core allocation and balanced resource profile, the ecs.g9it.16xlarge offers predictable compute performance for workloads requiring consistent CPU execution. The 1:4 vCPU-to-RAM ratio makes it suitable for general-purpose enterprise applications, web serving, application servers, and database workloads that do not require local NVMe storage or GPU acceleration.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g9it.16xlarge is a general-purpose instance built on the KVM hypervisor and powered by an Intel Xeon 6982P-C processor. Operating at 3.2 GHz, the instance features 64 dedicated physical cores and 64 vCPUs with a 1.0 thread-per-core ratio, ensuring dedicated compute allocation without hyperthreading. It is equipped with 256.0 GB of system memory, yielding a balanced 4.0 GB of RAM per vCPU. The instance does not include local storage, requiring network-attached storage solutions, and provides a baseline network bandwidth of 36 Gbps. With its dedicated CPU resources and balanced memory-to-core ratio, this instance is designed for enterprise applications, web serving, and database workloads that demand consistent, non-shared compute performance.
